word.name: class thread propagation
word.title: Class Thread Propagation
word.description: The relationship that propagates a class thread. Connects a Superset or Set to a child Set.

relationshipType.name: class thread propagation
relationshipType.title: Class Thread Propagation
relationshipType.description: Connects a Superset or Set to a child Set. Zero or more of these form the middle of a class thread.
